nasb.text: You contended with them by banishing them, by driving them away. With His fierce wind He has expelled them on the day of the east wind.

esv.text: Measure by measure, by exile you contended with them; he removed them with his fierce breath in the day of the east wind.

cnv.text: 不，你只是漸漸地，藉著他們被擄與他們相爭； 在吹東風的日子，就用暴風把他們逐去。

ccb.text: 祂与以色列人为敌， 使他们被掳， 驱逐他们离开本地， 用从东方刮来的暴风吹散他们。

csbs.text: 你与他们相争，把他们赶走、放逐； 在刮东风的日子，用暴风赶逐他们。
